verses.4: Indeed, on her children I will have no mercy,
verses.5: For their mother has played the prostitute.
verses.6: Therefore behold, I will hedge up your way with thorns,
verses.7: She will follow after her lovers,
verses.8: For she didn’t know that I gave her the grain, the new wine, and the oil,
verses.9: Therefore I will take back my grain in its time,
verses.10: Now I will uncover her lewdness in the sight of her lovers,
verses.11: I will also cause all her celebrations to cease:
verses.12: I will lay waste her vines and her fig trees,
verses.13: I will visit on her the days of the Baals,
verses.15: I will give her vineyards from there,
verses.16: It will be in that day,” says the LORD,
verses.17: For I will take away the names of the Baals out of her mouth,
verses.18: In that day I will make a covenant for them with the animals of the field,
verses.19: I will betroth you to me forever.
verses.20: I will even betroth you to me in faithfulness;
verses.21: It will happen in that day, that I will respond,” says the LORD.
verses.22: and the earth will respond to the grain, and the new wine, and the oil;
verses.23: I will sow her to me in the earth;
